calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside Entry Of Default, To Preclude Entry Of Any Default Judgment, And For Leave To File Answer; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities
TENTATIVE RULING: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for June 30, 2026. Line 5.

DEFENDANT Motion To Set Aside Entry Of Default, To Preclude Entry Of Any Default Judgment, And For Leave To File Answer;

Hearing Required. Process Server and Shulika Benzes to be present in person or via Zoom with video capability. =(501/CFH)

Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (669) 254-5252; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849). Parties who intend to appear at the hearing must give notice to opposing parties and the court promptly, but no later than 4:00 p.m. the court day before the hearing unless the tentative ruling has specified that a hearing is required. Notice of contesting a tentative ruling shall be provided by sending an email to the court to Department501ContestTR@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests. A party may not argue at the hearing if the opposing party is not notified, and the opposing party does not appear.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside Entry Of Default, To Preclude Entry Of Any Default Judgment, And For Leave To File Answer; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities
Off Calendar Jun-15-2026 Continued To Jun-30-26 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-20-2026 Continued To Jul-29-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEFAULT HEARING (PROVE UP)
Off Calendar Apr-29-2026 Continued To Jul-08-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 505
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk: Damon Carter; Dept. 505
Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 10:15am and concluding at 10:17am.

Plaintiff Christopher Smoak appearing represented by Andrew Westley, Esq.
Defendant Shulika Benzes appearing represented by Arthur Lipton.

Mr. Lipton stated he intends to file a motion to set aside the default in this matter.

This matter is continued to July 8, 2026 at 9:00am in dept. 505 to give counsel an oppertunity to meet and confer.

Mr. Smoak was instructed to prepare a judgment using the judicial counsel form and submit it to this department if they intend to go forward with default judgment on July 8.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
